*soon to be available on curseforge!*

# silly modpack

## Description

This is a collection of mods that has transit, automation, quality of life changes, new building blocks, improved world generation, and more.

### RAM Suggestion

It's recommended that you allocate at least 4GB of RAM to Minecraft for this pack.

### Version

The latest version of the pack runs fabric 1.19.2

## Mods sourced from outside sources
